title: ignition: recursively copy cert files
body:
This PR changes the SSL certificates copying mechanism to also include certificates in subdirectories.

I couldn't compile it on (and for) Mac, but I've verified the change works from logs by running `bin/podman machine init --log-level=debug` on Ubuntu.

Closes: #12799

comments.body:

[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED] 
to  your commit message.

@flouthoc @ashley-cui PTAL
@rhatdan - I've updated the commit message. Didn't add any tests as the original PR that introduced this feature (#12709) also didn't have any.
Lint does not like your commit.
@flouthoc - should be good now. FYI - on my Ubuntu `bin/podman machine init` returned exit code 1, but it happens also on `main` branch so my changes didn't seem to affect that process.
